chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Fasting

text: 1771 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «اَلصَّوْمُ جُنَّةٌ مِنَ اَلنَّارِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1771 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"Fasting is a shield from the Fire."
